creator: eduardo@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 225119
pet portclippy

Hello,

I've just updated your patch to organize it better to pet `portclippy Makefile`:

# PORTNAME block
PORTNAME
DISTVERSION
CATEGORIES
MASTER_SITES
DISTNAME

# Maintainer block
MAINTAINER
COMMENT

# License block
LICENSE
LICENSE_FILE

# Dependencies
LIB_DEPENDS

# USES block
USES

-CONFLICTS_INSTALL

# Configure block
GNU_CONFIGURE
+CONFIGURE_ENV

# Make block
ALL_TARGET

-CONFIGURE_ENV
# Conflicts
+CONFLICTS_INSTALL

# Packaging list block
PLIST_FILES

Cheers
